description: Placement group update: the label PUT once confirmed, and the label-pattern rejection now agrees in both languages (Go gained Python's pattern). Confirm-gate and group_id text still diverge.

cases.name: rejects an invalid label
cases.expect_error: label must start and end with an alphanumeric character and contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, or periods

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a placement group. Set confirm=true to proceed.
